hero.title: Discover Hargeisa
hero.subtitle: Ancient trade routes, warm hospitality, and a city rebuilding itself into one of the Horn of Africa's most compelling destinations.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search hotels, restaurants, places to visit…

home.destinationsSubtitle: Neighborhoods and landmarks worth your time
home.aboutDescription1: Go Hargeisa is a modern travel and city guide platform dedicated to Hargeisa, Somaliland. Whether you are a visitor or a local resident, our mission is to help you discover trusted hotels, restaurants, cafés, tourist attractions, shopping destinations and local businesses through one easy-to-use platform.
home.aboutDescription2: Create a free account to save your favourite places, write reviews, manage your profile and personalize your travel experience. Google Sign-In is used only for secure authentication and to keep your saved information synchronized across your devices.
home.exploreDescription: Browse trusted hotels, restaurants, cafés, tourist attractions, shopping destinations and local experiences across Hargeisa.
home.saveDescription: Sign in securely with Google to save your favourite places, manage your travel list and access your account from any device.
home.shareDescription: Share your experiences by writing reviews and help other visitors discover the best places in Hargeisa.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Monthly picks on new openings, events and travel tips. No spam.

footer.tagline: Your trusted guide to Hargeisa — hotels, food, culture and everything in between.
